description: This game is my 4th round in the Iwamoto Tournament. I had played the newly discovered Great Wall Fuseki {I had little intention of winning the game, since my 2 losses in the tourney made it impossible for me to win 1st place}. Black {Me} had messed up in the right side of the wall, and was seeking to make a huge fight on the left where a large group would have to die. Black was nearly successful, when a little mistake ruined it all...
